channel.title: About on Alexander Demin
channel.description: Recent content in About on Alexander Demin

item.title: Publications
item.description:
Journal Papers (Peer-Reviewed)

  • Factoring sparse polynomials fast. Journal of Complexity 88 (2025) 101934.
    Alexander Demin and Joris van der Hoeven (alphabetical order).
    arXiv · DOI

  • Progress in end-to-end optimization of fundamental physics experimental apparata with differentiable programming. Reviews in Physics 13 (2025) 100120.
    Max Aehle, Lorenzo Arsini, and 28 others, including Alexander Demin.
    DOI

  • Exact hierarchical reductions of dynamical models via linear transformations. Communications in Nonlinear Science and Numerical Simulation 131 (2024) 107816.
    Alexander Demin, Elizaveta Demitraki, and Gleb Pogudin (alphabetical order).
    Code · arXiv · DOI

item.title: Talks
item.description:
• Conference poster, Computing identifiable functions and simplifying ODE models. DART 2026, Conference on Differential Algebra and Related Topics, France, 2026.

  • Conference poster, Computing identifiable functions and simplifying ODE models. Future Algorithms conference, 2026. Best poster award

  • Invited talk, Simple generators of rational function fields and application to structural identifiability. Kolchin Seminar in Differential Algebra, Online, 2026.

  • Seminar talk, Computing globally identifiable parametrizations of dynamical models. Seminar at Max Planck Institute of Molecular Cell Biology and Genetics, Germany, 2025.
